# Keystone Legal

A law firm specializing in real estate legal services, offering professional legal counsel and representation for real estate transactions, disputes, and related matters. The firm aims to project trust, authority, and expertise in the real estate sector.

Our Practice

## Real Estate Law Built on Trust


Keystone Legal delivers sophisticated legal solutions with a practical approach—helping clients navigate complex real estate matters with clarity and confidence.

ABOUT OUR FIRM  →












### Client Focused


We prioritize your goals, delivering personalized real estate legal services tailored to your unique situation.









### Deep Real Estate Experience


Decades of focused practice in real estate law, from transactions to complex litigation.









### Strategic Solutions


Proactive legal strategies that anticipate challenges and protect your real estate investments.









### Integrity & Discretion


Uncompromising ethical standards and confidentiality in every attorney-client relationship.


















Our Expertise




## Comprehensive Real Estate Legal Services











### REAL ESTATE TRANSACTIONS


Navigating residential and commercial purchases with precise contract review, negotiation, and closing representation to protect your investment at every stage.









### TITLE & DUE DILIGENCE


Thorough title examinations, lien searches, and zoning analysis to uncover risks before they become liabilities, ensuring clean property transfers.









### REAL ESTATE DISPUTES


Assertive litigation and mediation for boundary conflicts, breach of contract, and title defects, delivered with the strategic rigor your case demands.









### COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE


Leasing, acquisition, and development counsel for office, retail, and industrial assets, balancing risk mitigation with your commercial objectives.









### LAND USE & ENTITLEMENTS


Navigating zoning approvals, variances, and subdivision maps with local agencies to unlock the full potential of your property.

Our Firm

## A Legacy of Trust in Real Estate Law




At Keystone Legal, we believe that every property tells a story, and every transaction deserves a foundation of unwavering legal integrity. Founded on the principles of precision and client-first representation, our firm has grown into a trusted pillar for individuals, families, and investors navigating the complex landscape of real estate.


Our philosophy is simple: we don't just process paperwork; we protect legacies. Specializing exclusively in residential, commercial, and investment real estate law, we combine deep industry insight with a personalized approach. Whether you are closing on your first home or structuring a multi-million dollar commercial portfolio, our team provides the strategic counsel you need to move forward with absolute confidence.




Meet Our Attorneys

















## Our Attorneys


Guiding your real estate matters with precision and authority.









### Eleanor Vance


Managing Partner


Practice Focus: Commercial Real Estate Acquisitions & Dispositions


With over 25 years of experience, Eleanor leads the firm's complex transactional practice, representing developers and institutional investors in high-stakes property matters.


Bar Admissions: Oklahoma, Texas









### Marcus Thorne


Senior Associate


Practice Focus: Real Estate Litigation & Dispute Resolution


Marcus is a tenacious litigator known for securing favorable outcomes in complex boundary disputes, title claims, and landlord-tenant conflicts.


Bar Admissions: Oklahoma









### Clara Benning


Associate Attorney


Practice Focus: Residential Transactions & Affordable Legal Services


Clara specializes in guiding families and first-time buyers through the closing process, ensuring clarity and confidence in every transaction.


Bar Admissions: Oklahoma, Arkansas











## Frequently Asked Questions


Clear answers to common questions about our real estate legal services.





**Q: Do I need an attorney to buy a home?**



While not legally required in all jurisdictions, having an experienced real estate attorney protects your interests throughout the transaction. We review contracts, identify potential issues, and ensure the title is clear before you close.





**Q: What does title review involve?**



Our title review examines the property's ownership history to uncover any liens, easements, or encumbrances. We verify the seller has the legal right to transfer the property and work to resolve any defects before closing.





**Q: How do you handle real estate disputes?**



We pursue resolution through negotiation and mediation whenever possible, but we are fully prepared to litigate boundary disputes, contract breaches, and title claims. Our goal is to protect your property rights efficiently and effectively.





**Q: What is due diligence?**



Due diligence is the investigation period where we verify every aspect of the property — zoning, environmental conditions, survey boundaries, and existing leases. It's your opportunity to uncover any issues before committing to the purchase.





**Q: How much do your services cost?**



We offer transparent, competitive pricing tailored to the scope of your matter. Whether you need a simple contract review or full litigation support, we provide a clear fee structure upfront so there are no surprises.





**Q: What areas do you serve?**



Keystone Legal serves clients across the state, with a primary focus on metropolitan and suburban real estate markets. Contact our office to confirm coverage in your specific county or region.






Still have questions? We're here to help.

Contact Us

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/18/2026



Keystone Legal ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Keystone Legal

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 18, 2026



Keystone Legal is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Keystone Legal

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 18, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Keystone Legal

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Legal Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Keystone Legal provides Legal Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Keystone Legal. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Keystone Legal

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
